cast.name: 埃可·安德里奥洛·兰齐 Eco Andriolo Ranzi

writer.name: 保利· 德卢卡 Paoli De Luca

director.name: 保利· 德卢卡 Paoli De Luca

introduction: One year after she started her gender transition, Marina spends a summer weekend at the house of her best friend, Camilla. Everyone tells Marina how beautiful she has become, but she doesn’t feel like that. Instead, she constantly compares her body to Camilla’s, that she observes and portrays on her notebook. The arrival at the house of an impetuous male presence, with Lorenzo and his friends, will put to hard test Marina, Camilla and the friendship between them.
